description.value:
When you're stumped, you can reach out through your hive mind to access the shared knowledge of your colony. Once per day, when you attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Recall Knowledge] with a skill you aren't trained in, you can treat your level as your proficiency bonus. Additionally, you can roll twice on the check and take the better result.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Hypertelepathy] feat, you can use the skill modifier of a willing ally within range of your telepathy even if it's a skill you aren't trained in.
